reviewerDecision.reviewer: T2 Spec Reviewer and T2 Code Quality Reviewer
reviewerDecision.summary: Spec Reviewer reported no findings. Code Quality Reviewer reported no blocking findings after previous issues were fixed: blank actor uid no longer writes and the JSDoc host uid contract permits null/undefined. Residual risk: blank actor name still fail-fast via the T1 service helper, matching existing service tests and not a T2 blocker.

evidence.engineerReport: Notification Runtime Engineer changed only src/runtime/client/use-cases/notification-use-cases.js and src/runtime/client/use-cases/notification-use-cases.test.js. Added notifyEventHostJoined runtime use case. It trims host uid and actor uid; skips no-write for missing or blank host or actor uid; skips self-notification after normalized host/actor uid comparison; writes normalized actorUid; writes via addNotificationDocument(buildNotificationDoc(...)); uses serverTimestamp(); and did not add hook integration, Firestore rules, participant reads, UI/package/workflow changes.
evidence.reviewerReport: T2 Spec Reviewer passed with no findings, verifying a single event_host_joined host notification via existing helpers, actor fields, entityType event, commentId null, read false, skip self/missing host/blank actor uid, and no T3/T4 scope creep. T2 Code Quality Reviewer passed with no blocking findings, verifying previous rejected issues fixed: blank actor uid no longer writes and JSDoc host uid contract permits null/undefined. Residual risk: blank actor name still fail-fast via T1 service helper, matching existing service tests and not a T2 blocker.
